---
name: "💡 Feature Request"
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: artcava
---

## Problem Statement

Describe the problem this feature would solve. Why is the current behaviour insufficient?

## Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed approach clearly and concisely.

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternative solutions or features you have considered and why you ruled them out.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2

## Additional Context

Links, screenshots, references to similar implementations, or any other relevant information.
